case_title: YONG FENG DBA GOOD IMAGE CLEANERS & LAUNDRY LLC VS. CATHERINE A. CHOW DBA CROWN CLEANERS

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY DEFENDANT CATHERINE A. CHOW DBA CROWN CLEANERS
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAR-01-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YONG FENG DBA GOOD IMAGE CLEANERS & LAUNDRY LLC IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CATHERINE A. CHOW DBA CROWN CLEANERS PLAINTIFF HAS NOT CARRIED ITS BURDEN OF PROOF. DEFENDANT SUBMITS AN INVOICE SHOWING AN AMOUNT OWED OF $9732 AND PAYMENTS TO SATISFY THAT INVOICE. PLAINTIFF HAS SUBMITTED NO EVIDENCE OTHER THAN DISPUTED TESTIMONY TO SHOW THAT THE TRUE AMOUNT IS HIGHER. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF YONG FENG DBA GOOD IMAGE CLEANERS & LAUNDRY LLC ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-13-2018 - JUDGMENT.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,886.20 FILED BY YONG FENG DBA GOOD IMAGE CLEANERS & LAUNDRY LLC AS TO DEFENDANT CATHERINE A. CHOW DBA CROWN CLEANERS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-13-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
